label: Tool use & function calling

node.label: Tool use & function calling
node.definition: Tool-use systems select a callable capability, generate typed arguments, execute it, observe the result, and incorporate that evidence into subsequent reasoning.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Tool use & function calling is to connect Decoder-only causal transformers, Caches, APIs & tool interfaces to downstream capabilities including ReAct-style reasoning and acting, Observe–plan–act agent loops, Multimodal assistants & vision-language systems.
examples: substrate for ReAct-style reasoning and acting
substrate for Multimodal assistants & vision-language systems
limitations: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Decoder-only causal transformers, Caches, APIs & tool interfaces.

dependencies.rationale: Tool use & function calling uses Decoder-only causal transformers as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Tool use & function calling uses Caches, APIs & tool interfaces as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Tool use & function calling stores, selects, or obtains information through External databases, APIs & live tools.
Tool use & function calling uses Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
